command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
LF="/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log"
echo "=== Watching Remy 80s. Send: @RemyDeviDollz_bot what is your name? ==="
LB=$(wc -l < "$LF" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
for i in $(seq 1 16); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '"reason":"[^"]*"|tool policy removed [0-9]+ tool|"message":"[^"]{0,80}"' | grep -iE "not-allowed|no-mention|tool policy|reply|send|skipping" | tail -4)
  if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then
    echo "--- +$((i*5))s ---"
    echo "$NEW"
  fi
done
echo ""
echo "=== Outcome summary ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '"reason":"[^"]*"' | sort | uniq -c
echo "--- any agent processing (tool policy = agent ran)? ---"
tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "tool policy removed"
echo "--- any telegram send/reply? ---"
tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LF" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram.*send|auto-reply.*sent|reply sent" | tail -3 | cut -c1-150
REMOTE
